work_unit: M-003 plugin archive fetcher SSRF guard
situation: audit-2026-07-03-012 derived fix M-003: defaultFetcher uses redirect:'follow' with no post-redirect URL validation; attacker-controlled plugin install URL can redirect to 169.254.169.254 or internal LAN IPs, leaking reachability of internal endpoints.
action: Added isPrivateOrLoopbackHost helper (covers RFC1918 10/172.16-31/192.168, loopback 127/8 ::1, link-local 169.254 fe80, ULA fc/fd, IPv6-mapped ::ffff). Changed defaultFetcher to redirect:'manual' with explicit hop-by-hop validation (max 5 redirects). Rejects non-http(s) protocols. Returns structured error on private IP / invalid URL / too many redirects.
outcome_evidence: Commit 904d774b2 on opt-open-design-1783015907. git status clean in worktree. Push 403 (external fork, known limitation — awaits human merge). cp-guard blocked re-commit from main but worktree already contains the change.
next_suggestion: Dispatch next pending finding M-005 (portless loopback origin bypass). After all H/M findings dispatched, address L-* findings and H-006 direction-shift.
